overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's waterfront district. The character moves from an upper city promenade with glass towers down to a canal-side path, through a neon-lit advertising tunnel, and onto a wooden boardwalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper city promenade with neon glass towers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the upper promenade with glass towers on the left

entered.detail: tall dark glass building with cyan and purple neon accent lighting
row of tall palm trees lining the promenade
illuminated advertising kiosk with holographic display
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
wide water canal with industrial buildings on the far side

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an upper city promenade in bright morning sunlight. Modern glass office towers with neon accents rise on the left while a wide canal stretches to the right. Palm trees line the walkway and a few pedestrians move in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway descending to waterfront level

events.description: character turns right and begins descending wide concrete stairs to the lower waterfront level

agents.ego_description: running down concrete stairs toward the canal waterfront

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase descending to the water level
black metal safety railing along the stairs and water edge
concrete retaining wall with colorful graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete stairway from the upper promenade to the lower waterfront level. The glass towers recede behind as the canal moves closer to the right side. Graffiti-covered walls appear on the left as the character moves under the elevated highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway under highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded concrete path beneath the overpass, passing pedestrians and benches

notable_agents.action: sitting on concrete bench against the graffiti wall

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with graffiti and benches at its base
massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows overhead
tall cylindrical white light posts along the water edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow concrete path squeezed between a graffiti-covered retaining wall and the canal. The area is shaded by the massive elevated highway overhead. Vertical light pillars line the water's edge and a few pedestrians sit on benches or walk in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian tunnel with digital advertising screens

events.description: entering fully enclosed tunnel section with bright digital advertisements
ambient light shifts from natural shadow to bright artificial neon pink and red glow from screens

agents.ego_description: jogging through the neon-lit tunnel past glowing advertisement screens

entered.detail: enclosed concrete tunnel with ceiling and walls covered in digital screens
large glowing screen displaying advertisements with pink and white colors
bright red and yellow digital advertisement screen with promotional text
green and yellow automated food vending stall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered pedestrian tunnel illuminated by bright neon digital billboards. The environment shifts from natural shadow to intense artificial pink and red lighting from advertisement screens lining both walls. The tunnel floor is wet and reflective, with a vending machine visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boardwalk with neon-lit buildings

events.description: exiting the covered tunnel back to open waterfront promenade
emerging from dark neon tunnel into bright morning sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk with the canal on the right and glass buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: person crouching near the water's edge taking a photograph

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway along the water's edge
curved glass building with prominent cyan neon trim and pink signage
small wooden pier extending into the canal water

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tunnel onto an open wooden boardwalk bathed in bright sunlight. Modern glass buildings with cyan neon accents line the left side while the canal stretches to the right. A photographer crouches near the water's edge, and the path continues along the waterfront with palm trees visible ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit upper city promenade down into a neon-lit underpass before emerging onto a bright waterfront boardwalk. It begins on a high walkway flanked by glass office towers and palm trees, moving steadily forward until the character descends a wide concrete stairway toward the lower waterfront. As the camera moves beneath the shadow of a massive elevated highway, the scene shifts to a narrow concrete path lined with graffiti-covered walls and vertical light pillars beside the canal. The environment then transitions from natural shade into a covered pedestrian tunnel saturated with intense pink and red light from reflective digital billboards and vending machines. Finally, the camera emerges from the artificial glow back into bright sunlight, opening up onto a wooden boardwalk with cyan-accented buildings and a photographer by the water's edge.
